name: Email And Logging
summary: Mixed collection of SMTP examples and Mako logging/email examples. Direct text, HTML, and EML email examples use socket.mail and can be adapted to Xedge email settings; the log variant is Mako-specific.

variants.eml: EML parser and template email example.
variants.log: Mako-specific mako.log and emailed error-reporting example.

use_when: The user wants direct SMTP email examples using socket.mail.
The user wants HTML or EML-based email templates.
The user wants to understand Mako Server email logging behavior.
avoid_when: The user wants a single homogeneous app root.
The user wants Xedge deployment of the mako.log variant without adaptation.
The user wants production secret handling without replacing demo SMTP configuration.
